name: Whitepages

optOut.leaveItGuidance: Whitepages shows name history prominently. If your former name isn't already listed, submitting a suppression request reveals the link — weigh it against how reachable the listing already is.
steps: Find your listing via the search URL.
Submit it on the suppression-requests page.
Complete the phone or email verification step.

notes: Re-check periodically; Whitepages re-lists from fresh sources.
attribution: Derived from Big-Ass Data Broker Opt-Out List (CC BY-NC-SA).
